description: CompositionOrange T-shirt for men made of 100% cotton, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves with nike swoosh, graphic and flock print on the frontFitStandardWash careMachine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsGet casual with the utmost comfort in this nike T-shirt. The cotton wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the fashionable graphic and flock print adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
